decoder_heading: What Information we use & how we use it:
ident_heading: What Information we use & how we use it:
heading_content_part: What Information we use & how we use it:.
Location

We only use GPS location as the functionality of the Application, We don’t collect it or share it with anyone else. We Take Location Permission in WIFI signal strength App because its required by the Android OS after Version marshmallow of the Android to scan Wifi Name and nearby Wifi networks so its used only to get Wifi Information like Wifi Name etc and scan nearby Wifi networks. It’s only used by the users of the App for their own use and users can also disable it. No BACKGROUND service is being used in the gps speedometer App, no geo fencing or other gps updates are being used in the App. only foreground service is being used

CameraWe use Camera only as an Infrared scanner, which is used to detect infrared light from a camera. We do not use camera for any other purpose and we do not take pictures or record video from camera..
Local Storage

We access local storage of the device to play the media / content selected by the user on Chromecast or similar casting devices. Other than that we don’t access the storage for any other purpose. On android 11+ devices we make a copy of the selected media in the allocated App’s space of the android device, we do this because due to the new restrictions regarding access to the local storage memory by Google new OS 11. After playing the selected media upon next selection of the media we delete the previous file copy

Read Google services configurationThis information is used to acquire the advertising ID we provide user with better advertising service by using such anonymous IDFor the LGPD we use some of the user's data to provide personalized ADS only if you wish not to use your data for personalized ADS then you can stop using our services
